theme: roots gambling on hidden nutrient patches
title: Roots on the Gamble: Carbon Allocation over Hidden Nutrient Patches
strategies: trivial: spread the step budget evenly over every active tip every step, ignoring sensed readings (reproduces the evaluator's weak recipe, ~0.1)

greedy: dump the whole step budget into whichever active tip currently senses the highest concentration, ties to lowest id -- full commitment, no portfolio; strands on shallow decoys and never advances a currently-boring tip far enough to find a bigger deep patch

strong: bet-hedging portfolio -- every active tip always gets a guaranteed minimum probe share (so every tip keeps revealing new depth all episode), and the remainder is a softmax-weighted share tilted by a UCB-style running-average-plus-exploration-bonus score reconstructed from the replayed history
invalid: request 50x+1000 the step budget on every tip -> fails validation, scores 0.0
